overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action-adventure game showing a character exploring ancient stone ruins at dusk. The character walks through a vaulted temple corridor toward a massive stepped pyramid, exits into an open courtyard, and begins ascending the central stairway toward silhouetted figures at the summit.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered temple corridor with vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark stone corridor toward the pyramid visible through the archway ahead

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the corridor ceiling and frame
tall stone wall with vertical columns on the left side
tall stone wall with vertical columns on the right side
massive stepped pyramid structure visible through the archway opening
vegetation hanging from the archway and upper structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit stone corridor with high vaulted ceilings. The ancient step pyramid is visible as a dark silhouette through the archway ahead, framed by the corridor walls. Sparse vegetation hangs from the stonework above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard before stepped pyramid

events.description: exits the covered stone corridor into the open courtyard, revealing the dusky night sky above

agents.ego_description: crossing the open stone courtyard toward the base of the stepped pyramid

notable_agents.action: distant silhouetted figures standing near the pyramid summit

entered.detail: dark blue and purple dusky sky with scattered clouds now visible overhead
ancient stone structure with columns visible on the right side of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the scene opens into a wide courtyard under a dusky sky. The massive stepped pyramid dominates the center view, significantly closer now. A stone building stands to the right while distant figures are visible near the pyramid's summit.

scene_state.functional_zone: central stairway of ancient stepped pyramid

events.description: begins ascending the steep stone steps of the pyramid's central stairway

agents.ego_description: climbing the central stone stairway of the pyramid toward the summit structure

notable_agents.action: figure standing at the top of the stairs near the temple entrance

entered.detail: steep stone ramp with steps leading up the center of the pyramid
high stone wall lining the left side of the stairway
high stone wall lining the right side of the stairway
dark temple entrance structure at the top of the pyramid stairs

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the pyramid base and begins ascending the steep central stairway, flanked by high stone walls. The pyramid structure now fills the frame, with the temple summit visible ahead against the darkening sky. A figure stands silhouetted at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a stone temple into the vast, open expanse of an ancient pyramid complex at dusk. It begins within a dimly lit corridor with high vaulted ceilings, where the dark silhouette of a stepped pyramid is framed by a distant archway and hanging vegetation. As the character exits the corridor, the scene opens into a wide courtyard under a dusky sky, bringing the massive pyramid and a neighboring stone building into clear view. The camera then follows the character to the base of the structure, ascending the steep central stairway flanked by high stone walls. Finally, the pyramid fills the frame as the climb continues toward a silhouetted figure waiting at the summit against the darkening sky.
